text.title: FinOps INFORM Phase — Cost Visibility Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on current tag coverage + chargeback maturity.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: define-mandatory-tags
step.action: Workshop with eng/finance to lock 5-tag set; document semantics.

step.name: encode-policy
step.action: Author OPA / AWS Config / Azure Policy rules; pilot in one account.

step.name: provision-dashboard
step.action: Build cost dashboard with 4 baseline panels; wire to CUR feed.

step.name: publish-baselines
step.action: Compute current $/unit metric; freeze baseline; commit artefact.
